title: helichrysum refractum
intro: Helichrysum refractum, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Helichrysum refractum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum refractum can be made into teas, tinctures, capsules, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
